---
name: gnostr-note
description: Send a text note.

# note

Use this skill for sending a text note.

## Verified notes

- `cargo run --bin gnostr -- note --help` shows the live flags.
- `gnostr -V` should be checked when behavior differs across environments.

## Common commands

```bash
cargo run --bin gnostr -- note --help
gnostr note --help
```

## Rules

- Keep content explicit.
